mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_skill_validation_run (skill_id, skill_version_id, provider_config_id, model_code, run_status, pass_rate, citation_rate, avg_score, start_time, finish_time, create_time) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{skillVersionId}, #{providerConfigId}, #{modelCode}, #{runStatus}, #{passRate}, #{citationRate}, #{avgScore}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE ai_skill_validation_run SET provider_config_id=#{providerConfigId}, model_code=#{modelCode}, run_status=#{runStatus}, pass_rate=#{passRate}, citation_rate=#{citationRate}, avg_score=#{avgScore}, start_time=#{startTime}, finish_time=#{finishTime} WHERE id=#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id AS run_id, skill_id, skill_version_id, run_status, pass_rate, citation_rate, avg_score, start_time, finish_time FROM ai_skill_validation_run WHERE id=#{runId}
